questionHtml:
Jacob hikes at an average speed of 3.9 km/h.

Find, to the nearest minute, the time it takes for Jacob to reach point C.
markschemeHtml:
attempt to use  time = distance speed       M1

6.0507 3.9  or 0.065768 km/min        (A1)

t = 93 (minutes)       A1

[3 marks]
